name: Local Go RL / Elo Ratchet
capability_target: capture tactics, territory shaping, pass/endgame handling, sparse reward self-play, and Elo trend evidence

output_contract.traces: bounded move traces for residual analysis

contamination_policy: Use local self-play and generated positions first. Do not import professional game corpora or public problem answers without an explicit license and contamination review.
regression_policy: Once 5x5 tactical gates are stable, preserve them as regression before increasing board size or adding stronger opponents.

permission_envelope.memory: benchmark-local ratings, traces, and residuals only
permission_envelope.tools: local python runner and report writers

teacher_role: Only diagnose rules, policy, or curriculum design failures. Do not provide public problem answer corpora or engine-distilled solution data.
